creator: kris@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Please take up interoperability problems with the OpenSSH developers - see 
www.openssh.com for contact details. FreeBSD's version is not separately 
developed and is based off the 'official' distribution with only minor 
changes. It is possible this is a known problem fixed in OpenSSH 2.1.1 - 
I will be upgrading FreeBSD's version soon.
